issues.description: Effect structure is completely wrong. Card text describes a passive battle protection (cannot be KO'd in battle if you have less Life than opponent), but DSL only contains a PlaySelf trigger. Should use OnAttacked trigger with condition checking Life differential and action preventing KO.
Trigger should be 'OnAttacked' not 'Trigger'. This protection activates when character is attacked.
Condition is 'Always' but should check life card comparison: your Life < opponent's Life.
Action is 'PlaySelf' which is incorrect. Should prevent KO (no KO action available in standard schema; typically handled via conditional negation or special battle protection logic).

suggestedDsl.effectText: If you have less Life cards than your opponent, this Character cannot be K.O.'d in battle.
